mission.title: openebs: [Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a new node should move the volumes.
mission.description: [Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a new node should move the volumes.. Requested by 1+ users.

steps.title: Check current openebs deployment
steps.description:
Verify your openebs version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openebs
helm list -n openebs 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working openebs installation.

steps.title: Review openebs configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant openebs configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openebs
kubectl get configmap -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openebs
```
## Description
I have a cStor pool configured properly on one of the node and for some reason if this node goes bad , I should be able to put these disks on new functional nodes so that my volume also gets migrated successfully.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a
steps.description:
This OEP contains the proposal to migrate the cStor pools from one node to another node upon changing the node selector on CSPC pool specs.

This OEP addresses the following issue: 
https://github.com/openebs/openebs/issues/2396
**NOTE**: It should be performed only after migrating the underlying
```yaml
kubernetes.io/hostname: gke-kmova-helm-default-pool-252c03d1-6g64
  uid: f50701b1-4b3c-11e9-8264-42010a80003a
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openebs
kubectl get events -n openebs --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This OEP contains the proposal to migrate the cStor pools from one node to another node upon changing the node selector on CSPC pool specs.

This OEP addresses the following issue: 
https://github.com/openebs/openebs/issues/2396
**NOTE**: It should be performed only after migrating the underlying disks to new node.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with openebs installed or the issue environment reproducible.
